title: ornus americana
intro: Ornus americana, also known as the American Buckthorn, is a deciduous shrub native to North America. The medicinal properties of Ornus americana lie in its roots, which contain anthraquinones and other compounds that have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ornus americana include its ability to treat constipation, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal problems, as well as its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Ornus americana can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although its use and preparation may require caution and consultation with a healthcare professional.
